meta-description: Learn about out-of-network copayments by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Out-of-network copayment
excerpt: A fixed amount (for example, $30) you pay for covered health care services from providers who don't contract with your health insurance or plan. Out-of-network copayments usually are more than in-network copayments.
content: A fixed amount (for example, $30) you pay for covered health care services from providers who don't contract with your health insurance or plan. Out-of-network copayments usually are more than in-network copayments.
